name: chosen/streams-grid
title: Streams Grid
description: Three audience streams (Teens / Young Adults / Young Couples) as side-by-side cards. Each card holds stream name, age band, intro paragraph and a parallel-structured topics list.

subhead.default: Streams are fundamental to Chosen. We know a 16-year-old has different life situations to a couple who've been married three years with two kids. We get it.

default.name: Teens
default.intro: Designed for high schoolers who are figuring out who they are and what they believe. A space to ask the big questions, build great friendships and discover what it actually looks like to live your faith.
topics: Navigating pressure as a young Catholic today

default.name: Young Adults
default.intro: For uni students and young professionals trying to figure out adulthood with faith and purpose. The stuff that actually matters at this stage of life? Done.
topics: Living on mission in everyday life

default.name: Young Couples
default.intro: For young couples who want to learn and build something strong, together. This stream is about growing in your relationship with each other and with God, and figuring out what a faith-filled life together actually looks like in practice, while juggling kids, jobs and everything in between.
